LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF NANCY CECIL'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION [CCP 1008] IS GRANTED. THE PORTION OF THE JANUARY 9, 2012 ORDER SUSTAINING THE DEMURRER WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO DEFENDANT ALAN SHAYNE IS NOW VACATED AND INSTEAD THE DEMURRER AS TO DEFENDANT ALAN SHAYNE IS SUSTAINED WITH TEN DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND TO ENABLE PLAINTIFF, IF SHE CAN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO PLEAD ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS. DUE TO THE CIRCUMSTANCES LEADING UP TO THE PRIOR HEARING, PLAINTIFF WAS DEPRIVED OF THE OPPORTUNITY TO SEEK LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD ALTER EGO ALLEGATIONS AND HAS NOW SHOWN GOOD CAUSE TO BE ALLOWED TO DO SO. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

Off Calendar Apr-06-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration [Ccp 1008]
Off Calendar Feb-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Tommy Ryan Lee, Esq., of the Law Offices of Tommy Ryan Lee, Tel. 888.536.6409, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.

No other appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF NANCY CECIL'S Motion For Reconsideration [CCP 1008] is Granted. The portion of the January 9, 2012 Order sustaining the demurrer without leave to amend as to defendant Alan Shayne is now vacated and instead the demurrer as to defendant Alan Shayne is sustained with ten days leave to amend to enable plaintiff, if she can do so in good faith, to plead alter ego allegations. Due to the circumstances leading up to the prior hearing, plaintiff was deprived of the opportunity to seek leave to amend to plead alter ego allegations and has now shown good cause to be allowed to do so. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-15-2012 Continued To Apr-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert N. Weaver, Esq., Law Office, 415-398-9800, for defendants and moving party

No other appearance on this matter. Courtesy copies of the moving papers received by the Court via e-mail. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT ALAN SHAYNE AND S.M.W.S.A., INC DBA THE SCOTCH MALT WHISKY SOCIETY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT.
Defendant's Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to Alan Shayne.
The Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to Scotch Malt Whiskey Society.
Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-09-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Robert N. Weaver, Esq., Law Office, 415-398-9800, for defendants and moving party
